title: Bloomberg Market Data
description: Market data structures used by the Bloomberg BLPAPI, modeling the core request/response and subscription paradigms for the //blp/refdata, //blp/mktdata, //blp/mktbar, and //blp/mktvwap services. Covers ReferenceDataRequest, HistoricalDataRequest, IntradayBarRequest, IntradayTickRequest, and real-time subscription data. Based on bloomberg.github.io/blpapi-docs.

ReferenceDataRequest.description: Request structure for the BLPAPI ReferenceDataRequest sent to the //blp/refdata service. Retrieves point-in-time field values for one or more securities.

securities.description: Array of Bloomberg security identifiers (e.g., IBM US Equity, AAPL US Equity).

fields.description: Array of Bloomberg field mnemonics to retrieve (e.g., PX_LAST, NAME, EPS_ANNUALIZED, MARKET_CAP).

overrides.description: Optional field overrides to modify the request context (e.g., EQY_FUND_CRNCY, END_DATE_OVERRIDE).

returnFormattedValue.description: When true, returns values as formatted display strings rather than raw typed values.

returnEids.description: When true, returns the entitlement identifiers (EIDs) associated with each field.

ReferenceDataResponse.description: Response structure for a BLPAPI ReferenceDataRequest, containing an array of security data elements.

securityData.description: Array of security data elements, one per requested security.

SecurityDataElement.description: A single security's data within a ReferenceDataResponse, including field values and any field-level exceptions.

security.description: The Bloomberg security identifier as specified in the request.

sequenceNumber.description: Sequence number indicating the order of this security in the response.

fieldData.description: Key-value pairs of requested field mnemonics and their returned values. Values may be strings, numbers, booleans, dates, or arrays for bulk fields.

fieldExceptions.description: Array of exceptions for fields that could not be returned for this security.

eidData.description: Entitlement identifier data when returnEids is enabled.

HistoricalDataRequest.description: Request structure for the BLPAPI HistoricalDataRequest sent to the //blp/refdata service. Retrieves time-series data for a set of securities and fields over a date range.

fields.description: Array of Bloomberg field mnemonics for historical retrieval (e.g., PX_LAST, OPEN, HIGH, LOW, VOLUME).

periodicitySelection.description: Periodicity of the historical data bars.

periodicityAdjustment.description: How to handle non-trading day data.

maxDataPoints.description: Maximum number of data points to return.

HistoricalDataResponse.description: Response structure for a BLPAPI HistoricalDataRequest, containing time-series data for a single security.

HistoricalSecurityData.description: Historical data for a single security within a HistoricalDataResponse.

sequenceNumber.description: Sequence number for this security in the response.

fieldData.description: Array of dated data points, each containing the requested field values for that date.

HistoricalDataPoint.description: A single dated data point in a historical time series.

date.description: Date for this data point in ISO 8601 format.

IntradayBarRequest.description: Request structure for the BLPAPI IntradayBarRequest sent to the //blp/refdata service. Retrieves summarized intraday bar data (OHLCV) for a single security.

security.description: Bloomberg security identifier (only one security per request).

eventType.description: Type of market event for bar construction.

startDateTime.description: Start date and time for the bar request in ISO 8601 format.

endDateTime.description: End date and time for the bar request in ISO 8601 format.

gapFillInitialBar.description: When true, fills the initial bar with data from the previous trading session.

IntradayBarResponse.description: Response structure for a BLPAPI IntradayBarRequest, containing an array of OHLCV bar data.

barTickData.description: Array of intraday bar data points.

IntradayBar.description: A single intraday bar containing OHLCV data and trade statistics.

time.description: Start timestamp of the bar interval in ISO 8601 format.

open.description: Opening price of the bar interval.

high.description: Highest price during the bar interval.

low.description: Lowest price during the bar interval.

close.description: Closing price of the bar interval.

volume.description: Total volume traded during the bar interval.

value.description: Total value traded during the bar interval (price times volume).

numEvents.description: Number of trade events (ticks) during the bar interval (num_trds).

IntradayTickRequest.description: Request structure for the BLPAPI IntradayTickRequest sent to the //blp/refdata service. Retrieves individual tick-level data for a single security.

security.description: Bloomberg security identifier (only one security per request).

eventTypes.description: Types of tick events to include.

startDateTime.description: Start date and time in ISO 8601 format.

endDateTime.description: End date and time in ISO 8601 format.

includeConditionCodes.description: When true, includes trade condition codes in the response.

includeExchangeCodes.description: When true, includes exchange codes identifying where the tick occurred.

IntradayTickResponse.description: Response structure for a BLPAPI IntradayTickRequest, containing an array of individual tick data.

TickEvent.description: A single tick event representing a market activity at a specific point in time.

type.description: Type of tick event (TRADE, BID, ASK, etc.).

value.description: Price or value of the tick event.

size.description: Volume or size associated with the tick event.

conditionCodes.description: Trade condition codes when includeConditionCodes is enabled (cond).

exchangeCode.description: Exchange code identifying where the tick occurred (exch).

MarketDataSubscriptionEvent.description: A real-time market data event received via //blp/mktdata subscription. Uses the Subscribe paradigm where field mnemonics differ from request fields (BID instead of PX_BID, ASK instead of PX_ASK). Delivered as MarketDataEvents messages.

correlationId.description: Unique correlation identifier mapping this event to the original subscription.

fields.description: Key-value pairs of real-time subscription field mnemonics and their current values. Common fields include BID, ASK, LAST_PRICE, OPEN, HIGH, LOW, VOLUME, BEST_BID, BEST_ASK.

timestamp.description: Timestamp of the market data event.

isDelayed.description: Indicates whether the data is delayed rather than real-time, based on subscription options.

FieldOverride.description: A field override modifying the context of a BLPAPI data request (e.g., currency adjustment, date override).

fieldId.description: Bloomberg field mnemonic to override (e.g., EQY_FUND_CRNCY, END_DATE_OVERRIDE, IVOL_DELTA_LEVEL).

value.description: Override value. Type depends on the field being overridden.

FieldException.description: An exception indicating a specific field could not be returned for a requested security.

fieldId.description: The field mnemonic that generated the exception.

subcategory.description: Error subcategory for more specific classification.

SecurityError.description: An error indicating the security itself could not be resolved or processed.

message.description: Human-readable error message describing why the security could not be processed.
